stages.task: Identify morning routine communities: meditation, journaling, exercise, yoga, prayer, reading, coding, language — verify 100K+ members + zero existing streak apps

Generate 8-12 app variants with custom icons, descriptions, keywords. Template: meditation-streak, journal-streak, pushup-streak, yoga-streak, prayer-streak, reading-streak, coding-streak, language-streak
Build iOS + Android for all variants from base template. Wire RevenueCat (IAP: $0.99-4.99/mo premium) + AdMob. Deploy to stores.
Seed launch: (1) engage in target subreddits daily, (2) Discord bot automation in 10+ servers, (3) Product Hunt coordinated launch, (4) micro-influencer outreach (50-500K followers), (5) press angles
Monitor installs/DAU/conversion daily. Identify top 3 variants by day 7. Allocate growth budget (FREE→LOW→MID tiers) to winners.
